risk_if_not_implemented: Without Removal of Assets, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Asset Inventories
compensating_control_1.justification: Asset Inventories (AST-02) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Removal of Assets (AST-11) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Delivery & Removal
compensating_control_2.description: Physical security mechanisms exist to isolate information processing facilities from points such as delivery and loading areas and other points to avoid unauthorized access.
compensating_control_2.justification: Delivery & Removal (PES-10) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Removal of Assets (AST-11) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
